description_long: This is a highly polished, gold-colored teapot with a rounded, squat body and a domed lid topped by a small, circular knob. The teapot features a prominent, curved handle on one side and a short, slightly angled spout on the opposite side. The surface is adorned with intricate, raised decorative patterns, including swirling motifs and what appears to be a dragon relief, giving it an ornate and luxurious appearance. The metallic finish is glossy and reflective, suggesting it is made from metal, possibly brass or gold-plated. The lid fits snugly and is also decorated, matching the overall aesthetic of the teapot. This object exudes a sense of elegance and would likely serve as both a functional and decorative piece.
description: A glossy, gold-colored teapot with ornate raised patterns, a domed lid, and a dragon motif, featuring a curved handle and short spout.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the domed lid with a central knob and the rounded body, with the handle visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ornate dragon relief, the curved handle on the left, and the short spout on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying swirling decorative patterns and the back of the handle, with the lid and knob clearly visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the handle on the right, the spout on the left, and the reflective, patterned surface.
attribute_spout_orientation: Short, slightly curved spout angled outward from the front side of the body.
attribute_handle_design: Thick, rounded loop handle attached at the upper and lower sides of the body, ergonomically curved for gripping.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed with a central round knob, fits snugly.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Raised swirling motifs and a dragon relief on the body, all in gold with no contrasting color.
